_notes: Same RP2040 + 2MB QSPI flash as the regular Pico, but adds a CYW43439 wireless module (2.4GHz WiFi + BLE 5.2). The CYW43439 occupies GP23 (WL_ON power), GP24 (WL_DATA SPI), GP25 (WL_CS), GP29 (WL_CLK + VSYS sense via ADC3). LED_BUILTIN is the WL_GPIO0 pin on the CYW43439, NOT a host MCU GPIO. BLE was enabled via firmware update post-launch and is supported in both pico-sdk and earlephilhower core.
name: Raspberry Pi Pico W (RP2040 + CYW43439)
special: CYW43439 wireless via SPI on GP23/24/25/29 (host-MCU pins are NOT user-available)
LED_BUILTIN routed to CYW43439 WL_GPIO0 (use cyw43_arch_gpio_put or digitalWrite(LED_BUILTIN))
VSYS monitor reads via ADC3 (internal channel) when WL_CS held high
